hotel_name: Holiday Inn Resort Phuket Karon Beach
rooms_summary: The Kids Suites with bunk beds and a separate children's zone are the reason most families book here, and when they get one in the renovated block reviews are warm. However, a large and growing share of recent reviews report being placed in rooms adjoining or above an active refurbishment, with noise, dust, and a chemical smell — this is the dominant recent theme (see hard flags).
facilities_summary: Two pools, a kids' pool, and a children's activity programme are well regarded, and the location next to Karon Beach is convenient. Facilities themselves are not the problem; the issue families raise is that parts of the resort have been fenced off during works.
food_summary: Breakfast is described as adequate and child-friendly with a decent spread, though without the standout praise the higher-end resorts get. A few reviews mention limited evening variety.
location_summary: Directly opposite Karon Beach with shops and restaurants in easy walking distance — families value being able to walk to dinner and the beach without a taxi. The flip side is more road noise and a busier, less resort-cocooned feel than the Mai Khao properties.

hard_flags.description: A major, resort-wide refurbishment is ongoing and dominates recent reviews: families report being assigned rooms beside active construction with sustained daytime noise, dust, paint fumes, and fenced-off pool and grounds areas. Multiple reviewers say they were not warned at booking and that room moves were refused due to full occupancy. This is severe and current.

conflicting_signals.rooms: Kids Suites are loved when renovated, but a large share report construction-adjacent rooms — a sharp split driven entirely by which block you are given.
conflicting_signals.facilities: Pools and kids' programme rated well; undercut by sections closed for works.
conflicting_signals.food: Broadly fine; no strong signal either way.
conflicting_signals.location: Praised for walkability; criticised for road noise.

rooms: the kids loved their bunk-bed suite
we were put next to the building works and couldn't sleep
facilities: kids' pool was great when it was open
half the grounds were fenced off
food: breakfast was fine for the children
location: walked to the beach and dinner every night
some traffic noise at the front

indian_food_signal: Thin. Little specific mention of Indian or vegetarian provision in reviews; one family noted they ate out given the nearby Karon restaurants.
